22.kj: also, and, either, if, at the least, [idiom] nor, or, otherwise, then, whether.
22.dv: presumed to be the 'constructive' or genitival form of אַו ; short for H185 (אַוָּה);

23.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
23.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

23.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
23.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
23.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

23.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
23.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).
fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.
23.dv: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);

24.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
24.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
24.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

24.gl: properly, to plait or interpenetrate, i.e. (literally) to weave or (generally) to fabricate; figuratively, to plot or contrive (usually in a malicious sense); hence (from the mental effort) to think, regard, value, compu
24.kj: (make) account (of), conceive, consider, count, cunning (man, work, workman), devise, esteem, find out, forecast, hold, imagine, impute, invent, be like, mean, purpose, reckon(-ing

24.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
24.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
24.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

24.gl: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
24.kj: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.

24.dv: or (fully) אוֹיֵב; active participle of H340 (אָיַב);

25.gl: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
25.kj: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).

25.gl: to awe or (intransitive) to dread; hence, to harass
25.kj: be affrighted (afraid, dread, feared, terrified), break, dread, fear, oppress, prevail, shake terribly.
drive (away, to and fro), thrust down, shaken, tossed to and fro.

25.gl: a leaf (as coming up on a tree); collectively, foliage

26.gl: to occupy (by driving out previous tenants, and possessing in their place); by implication, to seize, to rob, to inherit; also to expel, to impoverish, to ruin
26.kj: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poo

26.gl: (only in plural collectively or emphatic form) youth, the state (juvenility) or the persons (young people)
26.dv: or נָעֻר; and (feminine) נְעֻרָה; properly, passive participle from H5288 (נַעַר) as denominative;

26.kj: fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.
26.dv: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);

26.gl: to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe)
properly, bitterness; concretely, a bitter thing; specifically bile; also venom (of a serpent)

27.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
27.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

27.gl: a foot (as used in walking); by implication, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda
27.kj: [idiom] be able to endure, [idiom] according as, [idiom] after, [idiom] coming, [idiom] follow, (broken-)foot(-ed, -stool), [idiom] great toe, [idiom] haunt, [idiom] journey, leg,

27.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
27.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

27.gl: a well-trodden road (literally or figuratively); also a caravan
27.kj: manner, path, race, rank, traveller, troop, (by-, high-) way.

27.gl: to carve; by implication, to delineate; also to entrench
27.kj: carved work, portrayed, set a print.

28.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

28.gl: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
28.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

28.gl: to fail; by implication to wear out, decay (causatively, consume, spend)
28.kj: consume, enjoy long, become (make, wax) old, spend, waste.
